title: sophora alba
intro: Sophora alba, also known as White Sophora or Korean Sophora, is a plant species native to East Asia, characterized by its white or pink flowers and compound leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Sophora alba include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of Sophora alba can be found in teas, capsules, and extracts, often used to support cardiovascular health and immune function.
